basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) Data Entry Operator Notification 2026 has been released on the official website aiimsrishikesh.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Rishikesh Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 25 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Intermediate or 12th pass from recognized board,
qualification.details: Intermediate or 12th pass from a recognized board. A speed test of not less than 15000 key depressions per hour through speed test on a computer.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 11-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Rishikesh Data Entry Operator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Data Entry Operator position at AIIMS Rishikesh is 11th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Intermediate or 12th grade from a recognized board and possess a typing speed of at least 15000 key depressions per hour on a computer.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Data Entry Operator post is 25 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Data Entry Operator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 16,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications need to be sent via email to the official email address provided in the notification, along with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Data Entry Operator role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written examination followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at AIIMS Rishikesh.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Rishikesh located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Rishikesh is located in Rishikesh, Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, labeled as 'Official Notification PDF'.
